name: Zhengzhou Tiamaes Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Zhengzhou Tiamaes Technology Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of vehicle electronic products for urban public transport smart solutions. Its products include fare box and cashier counting machines; on-board computers, driving recorders, intelligent passenger counters, LED screens, and section station apparatus products; electronic bus-stop boards and guiding screens; and scheduling screens, dispatching terminals, and bus dispatching communication machines. The company also offers software products, such as enterprise resource management comprehensive information management system, urban public traffic intelligent application platform, bus comprehensive operation detecting monitoring platform, bus cashier system, bus intelligent dispatching system, travel services mobile client, bus operation monitoring platform, bus oiling management system, intelligent fare collection management cloud platform, passenger flow scheduling analysis system, and energy charging monitoring system solutions. It serves bus companies and cities. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
